01-project-setup.title: Project Setup — Backend Foundation
01-project-setup.notes: All backend foundation files created. Forked from Gebeya patterns. App imports verified. Ports: postgres=5436, redis=6383, backend=8012.

02-database-models.title: Database Models & Migrations
02-database-models.notes: All 11 model files created following Gebeya patterns (UUID PKs, Mapped types, timezone-aware datetimes). Initial Alembic migration generated and applied. All 11 tables verified in database.

03-auth-and-users-api.title: Auth & Users API
03-auth-and-users-api.notes: Auth deps (CurrentUser, OptionalUser, AdminUser), POST /auth/telegram, GET/PATCH /users/me, GET /users/{id}. Forked from Gebeya patterns with YeWaledoch-specific fields (role, parenting_role, children_data, reputation).

04-posts-api.title: Posts API — Feed, CRUD, Engagement
04-posts-api.notes: All posts endpoints implemented in backend/app/api/v1/posts.py. Feed with pagination/filtering/sorting, CRUD with role checks, like/save toggles with counter updates, report with duplicate prevention, saved posts list. Anonymous posts hide author info. Follows Gebeya patterns.

05-comments-api.title: Comments API
05-comments-api.notes: All comment endpoints implemented in backend/app/api/v1/comments.py. Two routers: post_comments_router (GET/POST under /posts/{id}/comments) and router (PATCH/DELETE/like/report under /comments/{id}). Features: threaded replies (one level deep), expert answer flag, anonymous comments, auto-promote member→contributor at 10 comments, notifications for post author and parent comment author, like toggle, report with duplicate prevention.

06-admin-api.title: Admin API — Dashboard, Drafts, Management
06-admin-api.notes: All admin endpoints implemented in backend/app/api/v1/admin.py. Dashboard stats, draft queue (list/edit/publish/discard), content management (list/edit/delete posts), user management (list/role/ban/unban), reports (list/resolve with remove/dismiss/ban actions), scraper trigger (background), broadcast (in-app notifications + Telegram bot messages). All endpoints require AdminUser dependency. Scraper trigger gracefully handles missing scraper module (task 07).

07-reddit-scraper.title: Reddit Scraper & AI Translation Pipeline
07-reddit-scraper.notes: All scraper modules implemented: reddit_scraper.py (async httpx, rate-limited), translator.py (Claude API with cultural adaptation), scheduler.py (pipeline orchestrator with Telegram admin notifications). Categories seed data created. Admin scraper trigger updated to use run_pipeline. Runnable via python -m scraper.scheduler or POST /admin/scraper/run.

08-notifications-api.title: Notifications, Children & Resources API
08-notifications-api.notes: All endpoints implemented. Notification API (list/mark-read/mark-all-read), Telegram bot service (send notifications with deep links, comment/like/expert reply notifications, batched broadcast), Children CRUD with auto-populated Ethiopian EPI vaccination schedule, vaccination logging (updates pending or creates new), milestone logging, resources API serving seed data (vaccines, milestones, categories). Routes registered at /notifications, /children, /resources.

09-frontend-setup.title: Frontend Setup — React + Telegram Mini App
09-frontend-setup.notes: All frontend foundation files created. Forked from Gebeya patterns. React 18 + Vite 5 + Tailwind CSS 3 + Telegram SDK. API client with full TypeScript types for all models. i18n with Amharic/English. Auth hook with dev mode mock. 5-tab navigation (Home, Topics, Write, Alerts, Me). Deep link support for posts. npm run build succeeds.

10-frontend-home-feed.title: Frontend — Home Feed & Post Detail
10-frontend-home-feed.notes: All components implemented. PostCard with like toggle, skeleton loading. HomePage with infinite scroll (IntersectionObserver), debounced search, pull-to-refresh. PostDetailPage with full content, author info, like/save/share, source attribution, threaded comments with CommentThread + CommentInput (anonymous toggle). Common components: LoadingScreen, EmptyState, CategoryBadge. i18n keys added for am/en. Build succeeds.

11-frontend-topics-write.title: Frontend — Topics & Create Post
11-frontend-topics-write.notes: All components implemented. TopicsPage with category grid (3-col, emoji + bilingual labels). TopicFeedPage with sort tabs (latest/popular/discussed) and infinite scroll. CreatePostPage with full form (type selector, title, category, age group, body, image upload to MinIO, tags, anonymous toggle, discussion prompt, preview mode). LockedWritePage shows progress bar (comments/10). PostTypeSelector horizontal buttons. CategorySelector bottom sheet. Backend storage service (MinIO) and upload endpoint added. i18n keys for am/en. Build succeeds.

12-frontend-profile-notifications.title: Frontend — Profile, Notifications, Resources
12-frontend-profile-notifications.notes: All 9 subtasks implemented. ProfilePage with user info, stats, children list, quick links. AddChildModal with form. ChildProfilePage with vaccinations (VaccinationChecklist) and milestones tabs. NotificationsPage with date grouping, mark all read, tap-to-navigate. MyPostsPage and SavedPostsPage with PostCard list. ResourcesPage with vaccines, milestones, recipes, emergency contacts, pregnancy guide. SettingsPage with language toggle, notification prefs, edit profile, about. Backend: added /posts/mine endpoint, fixed /posts/saved route. i18n keys added for am/en. Build succeeds.

14-deployment.title: Deployment — Docker, CI/CD, Bot Setup, Seed Data
